diagrams.title: Many-to-One Model
diagrams.description: Shows multiple user threads (UT1, UT2, UT3) mapped to a single kernel thread (KT). All user threads share one kernel thread.
elements: Mapping arrows from all UT to single KT
diagrams.purpose: Understand one-to-many mapping and blocking behavior

diagrams.title: One-to-One Model
diagrams.description: Shows one-to-one mapping between user threads and kernel threads. Each user thread has dedicated kernel thread.
diagrams.purpose: Understand parallel execution capability and overhead

diagrams.title: Many-to-Many Model
diagrams.description: Shows multiple user threads multiplexed to fewer kernel threads. Dynamic mapping allows efficient resource utilization.
diagrams.purpose: Understand efficient resource allocation and concurrency

diagrams.title: Round Robin Scheduling
diagrams.description: Demonstrates cyclic execution of processes with time quantum. Shows ready queue and execution timeline.
elements: Ready Queue at time 0: P1, P2, P3
diagrams.purpose: Visualize time-sliced scheduling and calculate metrics

diagrams.title: Multithreading Models Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of all four models with their characteristics.
